title: local-signing tests reference nonexistent .github/workflows/ci.yml
description: The test module comment says 'Key files live in /tmp and must be pre-generated by CI (see .github/workflows/ci.yml)'. This repo has no remote and no .github/ directory; the file does not exist. A contributor wanting to run or debug the signing tests follows this pointer and finds nothing. Fix: replace the CI reference with an inline snippet showing the openssl commands that generate the test keys, or add a Makefile target/shell script in the repo root.
